description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing Physical Damage. On critical hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. For each [Wound] stack, this skill's damage is increased by 20%, and you are immune to all damage while casting.
Removes your harmful effects and increases Attack and Critical Hit Chance by [500->600] for [20 sec->10 sec].
Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away.
On critical hit, increases Attack for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10. If [Wound Stacks] is 10, deals additional damage equal to 150% of Attack Power.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is changed to increase Critical Damage by [(added) 120%], and damage dealt to bosses is increased by [25%->30%].

description.unified: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}%, and reduces the target's P.Block Chance by 500 for 10 sec.
[Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}% and upon a Crit Hit, recovers Mana by 200.
Each time a critical hit occurs, for 15 sec your Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
